landing.heroTitle: Build a professional resume in minutes
landing.heroSubtitle: Free, no sign-up required. Pick a template, fill in your details, and download a polished PDF straight from your browser.

templates.title: 5 professional templates
templates.description: Basic, Modern, Minimal, Elegant, and Classic — pick the look that fits you.

coverLetter.title: Matching cover letters
coverLetter.description: Build a coordinated cover letter alongside your resume, with its own templates and live customization.

customization.title: Full customization
customization.description: Colours, typography, font size, and drag-and-drop layout, all live.

pdf.title: One-click PDF export
pdf.description: Download a print-ready PDF whenever you're happy with it.

email.title: Email it directly
email.description: Send your finished PDF straight to any email address — no download required.

languages.title: 13 languages
languages.description: The whole builder translates instantly, not just your resume text.

saveResumes.title: Save & come back later
saveResumes.description: Keep multiple resumes and cover letters saved, and edit them anytime.

sarah.quote: This tool helped me build a professional resume in minutes — I landed three interviews within a week!
sarah.name: Sarah T.

james.quote: The templates are beautifully designed and incredibly easy to customize.
james.name: James K.

elena.quote: I love that I can switch languages instantly — my whole family uses it now.

noah.quote: Finally a resume builder that doesn't require an account just to try it out.
